notes: Every level/scene/arena in inventories/*.game-level.json — visual products only. Vars: mechanic (the level's signature mechanic), mood.

steps.title: Design {name}: layout, pacing, teaching beat
steps.description: Design {name}: layout sketch, difficulty curve position, what it teaches or tests ({mechanic}), fail/retry loop feel, target duration, and mood ({mood}) per 04-DESIGN-LANGUAGE.md.
acceptance_criteria: design doc with layout + pacing + teaching intent

steps.title: Build {name} playable
steps.description: Implement {name} at {path}: geometry/entities, triggers, win/fail conditions, checkpoint placement.
acceptance_criteria: fail states recover to checkpoint correctly

steps.title: Tune {name} difficulty and feel
steps.description: Playtest-tune {name}: timings, spacing, forgiveness windows; the {mechanic} beat must feel fair on first encounter and mastering it must feel earned.
acceptance_criteria: no unfair deaths reported in tuning notes

steps.title: Audio-visual dressing for {name}
steps.description: Apply {name} mood ({mood}): lighting/palette pass, ambient audio hookup, transition stingers — assets come from the media-asset inventory (dep on its integrate tasks).
acceptance_criteria: mood readable within 3 seconds of entry
all referenced assets registered in the manifest

steps.description: Measure {name} on the reference low-tier profile: frame time within budget through the heaviest moment; SOTA tier effects verified to disable cleanly.
acceptance_criteria: worst-case frame time within budget on baseline

steps.title: Automated completion test for {name}
steps.description: Scripted playthrough of {name} in CI: completability, win/fail triggers, checkpoint restore.
acceptance_criteria: headless completion test green in CI

steps.description: Instrument {name}: attempts, completion time, death heatmap points, quit-without-finish; real errors breadcrumbed per SRS rules.
acceptance_criteria: funnel events verified in dev tooling
